items.name: Equine-Assisted Therapy
items.shortDescription: Develop your skills and achieve your goals with horses. Facilitated by Occupational Therapists with extensive equestrian experience.

items.name: Skill Building OT
items.shortDescription: If disability or trauma is impacting your daily functioning in everyday tasks, we can help you to build skills to increase independence.

items.name: Primitive Reflex Integration
items.shortDescription: Primitive reflexes are vital for child development. Our skilled clinicians test for retained reflexes and create movement programs to facilitate integration.

items.name: Parent Coaching
items.shortDescription: When working with a child with a disability, it is best practice for the parent to be involved so that therapy is most effective.

items.name: Social Connection Group
items.shortDescription: Dynamic occupational therapy social connection groups tailored to enhance social interaction and foster meaningful connections among participants.

items.name: Art Therapy
items.shortDescription: Creative expression as a pathway to healing and growth. Our art therapy sessions use sensorimotor approaches to support regulation, self-expression, and wellbeing.

items.name: Outdoor Therapy
items.shortDescription: Nature-based therapeutic interventions that harness the healing power of the outdoors to build skills, confidence, and connection.

items.name: NDIS Plan Reviews & Functional Capacity Assessments
items.shortDescription: We complete OT documentation required to help assist your NDIS plan review, including letters of support, reports, and therapy plans.
